note: BRAIN layer — Day 54 (Wednesday 2026-05-20, Batch 5 Day 8 — POST-DAY-7 MONITORING). new_replies.json unchanged from 2026-04-04 (46 days). Zero Batch 5 replies confirmed to date. IMAP gap: 46 days from last confirmed check. Post-Day-7 reply wave OPEN NOW — peak 24-48h = TODAY Wednesday and Thursday 2026-05-21. IMAP MANDATORY today per Batch 5 lead. Any new reply: write raw text to new_replies.json immediately, then classify here. LinkedIn channel: PERMANENTLY CLOSED (archive trigger assumed fired 2026-05-19 EOD). Day-14 breakup: Tuesday 2026-05-26.
tuesday_sweep_status: UNCONFIRMED — no new entries in new_replies.json. Tuesday per-lead sweep either not executed or returned zero replies.
reply_peak_post_day7: OPEN NOW — peak TODAY Wednesday 2026-05-20 (24-48h) and Thursday 2026-05-21 (48-72h). Historically the strongest reply window in the full sequence.

imap_mandatory_today.execute: Per Batch 5 lead — immediately. Post-Day-7 reply wave peak is TODAY.
imap_mandatory_today.priority: Highest urgency. 46-day gap. Reply window is OPEN.

outcomes_and_actions.if_interested: Write immediately to data/new_replies.json (full raw text). Classify here as INTERESTED with full reasoning. Cancel Day-14 send for that lead — use proposal flow instead. Prepare bespoke proposal within 24h from reply time (NON-NEGOTIABLE — 24/7). Log CHANGELOG. Add entry to value_delivery_queue.json batch_5_interested_leads. Update CRM to proposal_sent.
outcomes_and_actions.if_not_interested: Classify here as NOT_INTERESTED. Cancel Day-14 permanently. Suppress email channel. Log CHANGELOG. Update lead status to 'lost'.
outcomes_and_actions.if_unsubscribe: Classify here as UNSUBSCRIBE. Suppress ALL channels within 24h (GDPR Article 21). Log audit_log and CHANGELOG. Cancel Day-14.
outcomes_and_actions.if_ooo: Classify here as OUT_OF_OFFICE. Note return date. Pause Day-14 (return must be before 2026-05-25 to receive Day-14). 4-touchpoint limit applies.
outcomes_and_actions.if_wrong_person: Classify here as WRONG_PERSON. Pause sequence. Investigate correct contact via website/Companies House. Log CHANGELOG.
outcomes_and_actions.if_clean: No action. Monitor Thursday. Proceed with Day-14 on 2026-05-26.

post_day7_monitoring.imap_check_frequency: Per lead TODAY and Thursday minimum. Friday final pre-weekend check.
post_day7_monitoring.classification_protocol: Write any new reply to new_replies.json immediately. Classify here same session. Update value_delivery_queue.json if INTERESTED. Log CHANGELOG same session.
post_day7_monitoring.note: Day-7 post-send window is historically the strongest reply window for undecided leads — they have had 7 days to consider the Day-0 pain point, and the new angle in Day-7 creates fresh urgency. Do not miss this window.

if_interested.action: Write reply to new_replies.json immediately. Classify here as INTERESTED with full reasoning. Cancel Day-14 for this lead (use proposal flow instead). Reply in thread or via preferred channel. Proposal within 24h from reply time (24/7 — NON-NEGOTIABLE). Update value_delivery_queue.json batch_5_interested_leads. Log CHANGELOG.
if_interested.24h_sla: NON-NEGOTIABLE. Tom (Ripon Road Carpentry) asked for pricing and never received it. That does not repeat. 24h applies 24/7 including weekends.
if_interested.proposal_options: See value_delivery_queue.json (value_delivery_on_interested section) — 3 options by signal type.

if_not_interested.action: Classify as NOT_INTERESTED. Cancel Day-14 permanently. Suppress email channel permanently. Log CHANGELOG. Update lead status to 'lost'.

if_ooo.action: Classify as OUT_OF_OFFICE. Note return date. Pause Day-14. Send Day-14 on day after stated return if within window (return must be before 2026-05-25). 4-touchpoint hard limit.

if_wrong_person.action: Classify as WRONG_PERSON. Pause sequence. Investigate correct contact via website or Companies House. Log CHANGELOG.

if_unsubscribe.action: Classify as UNSUBSCRIBE. Cancel Day-14. Suppress ALL channels permanently within 24h (GDPR Article 21). Log audit_log and CHANGELOG.
